Biology.text:
Match the entries in column I and column II regarding animal classifications.

[Image of the classification of Chordata and Hemichordata characteristics]

Column I: P. Notochord and hollow nerve cord present; Q. Ectoparasite with 6-15 pairs of gills and closed circulation; R. Marine animals with persistent notochord and placoid scales; S. Animals with open circulatory systems, and stomochord. Column II: i. Cyclostomata; ii. Chondrichthyes; iii. Hemichordata; iv. Chordata.
Chromosomes are classified as metacentric, sub-metacentric, acrocentric and telocentric based on the position of which structure?
Which one of the following options describes a triglyceride?
options: Three glycerol molecules linked to a fatty acid chain
Three fatty acid chains linked to a molecule of glycerol
Three saturated fatty acid chains linked to a molecule of cholesterol
Three glyceride molecules linked to a molecule of phospholipid

Biology.text: Which one of the following statements about a plant carotenoid is FALSE?
options: It provides precursor for the synthesis of stress hormone in plants.
It protects chlorophyll a from photo-oxidation.
It accumulates in chromoplasts during fruit ripening.
It is an accessory pigment which absorbs light at 600-700 nm.

Biology.text: Relative number of ATP synthesized in mitochondria when treated with chemical X (inhibits Complex I to ubiquinone) or chemical Y (inhibits Complex III to cytochrome C)?
Which autoregulatory mechanism is employed by the kidney when glomerular filtration rate is reduced?
options: Levels of renin, angiotensin I and II and aldosterone are increased.
Levels of renin and aldosterone are reduced.
Levels of renin are increased, while those of angiotensin I and II and aldosterone are reduced.
Levels of angiotensin I and II are increased, while that of aldosterone are reduced.

Biology.text: Which condition will favour maximum dissociation of oxygen from the oxyhaemoglobin in the tissues?
Which one of the following statements is correct regarding muscle fibres?
options: Mitochondria are more in white than in red muscle fibres.
Red muscle fibres produce ATP aerobically under normal oxygen conditions.
Lactic acid accumulates more in red than in white muscle fibres.
All muscle fibres primarily produce ATP anaerobically.

Biology.text: Which one of the following organisms produces the female gamete by mitosis of haploid cells?
Which amino acid will be charged on the tRNA with anticodon 5'-GUU-3'?
Genotype of parents R1 through R4 based on double heterozygous (PpQq) gamete proportions?

options: Viruses with DNA genome and no reverse transcriptase
Viruses with RNA genome and reverse transcriptase activity
Viruses with DNA genome and reverse transcriptase activity
Viruses with RNA genome and no reverse transcriptase

Biology.text: Which diagram correctly represents restriction enzyme sites (X, Y) on the 10,000 bp plasmid?
Which one of the following statements is INCORRECT about honey bees?
options: Honey bee males are produced from unfertilized eggs and females from fertilized eggs.
Honey bee males cannot have daughters but can have sons.
A honey bee male does not have a father but has a grandfather.
Honey bee males form gametes by mitosis and females form gametes by meiosis.

Biology.text: Which one of the following statements is FALSE regarding ecological energetics?
options: Only 10% of energy is transferred to each of the higher trophic levels.
All organisms of a trophic level should be included for estimation of energy content.
More than 80% of the solar energy incident on earth is captured by plants.
The movement of energy is unidirectional in the ecological pyramid of energy.

Chemistry.text: Which statement best describes the nature of ZnO and CaO[cite: 221]?
options: Both ZnO and CaO are amphoteric.
ZnO is amphoteric, while CaO is basic.
ZnO is basic, while CaO is amphoteric.
ZnO is acidic, while CaO is basic.

Chemistry.text: Which processes are associated with increasing bond order but no change in magnetic behavior? (i) \(N_2 \rightarrow N_2^+\) (ii) \(O_2 \rightarrow O_2^+\) (iii) \(O_2 \rightarrow O_2^-\).
What is the value of \(E^\circ(Fe^{3+}/Fe^0)\) given \(E^\circ(Fe^{3+}/Fe^{2+}) = 0.77\) V and \(E^\circ(Fe^{2+}/Fe^0) = -0.44\) V?
What are the correct orders of stability for \(VF_5\), \(VCl_5\), \(CuCl_2\), and \(CuI_2\)?
Based on the coordination chemistry reaction scheme for P and Q, which is correct[cite: 269, 280]?
options: P shows geometrical isomerism and absorbs light of higher wavelength than Q.
Both P and Q show geometrical isomerism.
Q shows geometrical isomerism and absorbs light of higher wavelength than P.
P shows geometrical isomerism and absorbs light of lower wavelength than Q.

Chemistry.text: How many 3-hydrogen atoms are present in 2-methyl-3-phenyl-pentan-1-al[cite: 291]?
Which reaction does NOT provide an aldehyde as a product[cite: 302]?
What are the major products formed in the ozonolysis followed by Grignard sequence[cite: 316, 317]?
What is the major product in the reaction sequence given below?
Which structure of I produces 2,3-dimethyl-cyclohexanone after hydroboration-oxidation and CrO3 treatment[cite: 367, 368]?
Ideal gas expansion from V to 2V. If work in two steps is 7/12 RT, how much more work in three equal steps[cite: 382]?
Correct plot for rate constant \(5 \times 10^{-5}\) and pre-exponential factor unit mol L\(^{-1}\) min\(^{-1}\)?
Time period of revolution of electron in the fourth Bohr orbit of \(He^+\)?
Dipole moments I (0.0 D), II (0.2 D), III (1.5 D). Identity[cite: 422, 423, 424]?
options: I: BF3 II: NF3 III: NH3
I: BF3 II: NH3 III: NF3
I: ClF3 II: NF3 III: NH3
I: BCl3 II: NH3 III: NF3

Chemistry.text: Which reaction does NOT occur in a lead-acid battery[cite: 434, 435]?

Mathematics.text: Numbers of 3-digit integers divisible by 5 with no repeated digits[cite: 446, 447]?

Number of x values for which matrix A is symmetric[cite: 457, 460]?

$$A=[\begin{matrix}4&-1&cos~x\\ -1&5x&25\\ x^{2}+1&25&7\end{matrix}]$$
Divisibility of sum n = sum(r=0 to 100) (-1)^r * ...[cite: 469, 473, 474]?
True statement for f(x) = cos(tan^-1 x)[cite: 487, 488]?
Value of |4z1 + z2 + z3| given complex number conditions[cite: 507, 510, 511]?

options: Non-zero integers are points of discontinuity
Every integer is a point of discontinuity

Mathematics.text: Line perpendicular to tangent of ellipse at (1, sqrt(3)/4) passing through (2, 0)[cite: 531, 532, 534]?
Value of |(a+b).(2i+3j+k)| based on vector properties[cite: 543, 544, 545, 546]?
Derivative of log(sin^2 x) w.r.t sin x[cite: 555, 556]?
Value of a13 - a10 given Sn+3 - Sn = 13n+7[cite: 566, 567]?
Probability of at least two heads in five coin tosses[cite: 577, 578]?
Is piecewise f(x) one-one or onto[cite: 588, 589, 591]?
Value of integral x cos x sin x dx from 0 to pi/2[cite: 610, 611]?

Physics.text: Consider an elastic collision between two particles A and B of same mass, moving in the same direction. Particle A is moving at speed vA and particle B is moving at speed vB. Which of the following describes the motion most accurately?
A block of mass M lies at rest connected to a massless spring of spring constant k. A bullet of mass m hits the block horizontally with speed v and sticks to it. What is the maximum compression?
A cart of mass M is released from point A of a frictionless track and enters a semicircular arc of radius R. Which quantity does not play a role in ensuring the cart does not leave the track?
A circular disk of mass M and radius R rotates with angular velocity w. A torque T is applied to oppose rotation. What is the angular displacement attained before it reverses direction?
A metallic cube emitting black body radiation at T shows a 4.5% power increase when T increases by 1%. What is the approximate percentage increase in volume?
Two pipes A (one end closed) and B (both open) have matching sound frequencies for their nA-th and nB-th harmonics. What is the relation between TA and TB?
Consider two waves y1 and y2 = sqrt(3)A cos(kx - wt). What are the resultant amplitude As and phase difference phi with y1?
A particle of charge q and mass m enters an electric field between parallel plates of length l and separation d. What is the minimum kinetic energy K (in eV) to not hit the plates?
What is the potential difference between points P and Q in the capacitor circuit once fully charged?
A particle (q, m) with velocity v = v0(i+j-k) is in a magnetic field B = B0(i+j+k). Which option is correct for radius r and pitch p?
A charged particle in a circular orbit is enclosed in a metallic frame. What happens to the trajectory as the frame radius is gradually decreased?
options: Radius remains same but frequency increases

Physics.text: An equilateral prism and a parallelepiped block are arranged as shown. What is the angle of emergence theta?
Intensity after P1 is 3I0/16 when P2 is inserted between source and P1. What is a possible value of angle theta?
An electron in ground state E1 absorbs photon Ea. What is the value of the principal quantum number n?
Two particles (m, q) and (M, q) are accelerated through d1 and d2 respectively. If they have the same de Broglie wavelength, what is d2/d1?
